titles.title: Touch My Life O, Holy Spirit

properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6 v7 v8

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Come now Holy Spirit I am here now Let the Holy Spirit Flow and touch me

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: My Lord, my King is Yours All of my heart Come now and receive My praise

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I want to be an offering On Your altar Father My life I place in Your holy hands

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Even though I might not have Would to express When Your love Invades my soul

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Touch my life o Holy Spirit Come and embrace me O Holy Spirit And renew my life O Holy Spirit Show me Your love O Holy Spirit

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: I want to be an offering On Your altar Father My life I place in Your holy hands

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: Even though I might not have Words to express When Your love Invades my soul

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: Touch my life o Holy Spirit Come and embrace me O Holy Spirit And renew my life O Holy Spirit Show me Your love O Holy Spirit
